infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: PlantLab uses Bluetooth to read nearby Wi-Fi network names from your ESP32 during setup.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: PlantLab can connect to the device setup network for the compatibility SoftAP setup flow.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: PlantLab uses Bluetooth to read nearby Wi-Fi network names from your ESP32 during setup.

plugins.cameraPermission: PlantLab uses the camera to scan the serial-number QR code on your device label.
